name: Chambord Cheesecake Txbg93a
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chocolate wafer or graham cracker crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix crumb crumbs with 2 tablespoons sugar and melted butter in a bowl until combined.
3. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
4. Bake for 10 minutes, then cool completely.
5. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth.
6. Gradually add 1 cup sugar to the cream cheese, beating until fluffy.
7. Stir in vanilla extract, raspberry jam, and liqueur.
8. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
9. Pour the mixture over the crust in the springform pan.
10. Bake until the center is firm, about 1 hour.
11. Allow to cool to room temperature before refrigerating for at least 3 hours but no more than 10 days.
12. Serve chilled with active personal touch.
Note: This recipe was shared by the owner of the Mc Recipe Austin Sierra email list on April 4, 1992.
